studyName: Pancreatitis after Treatment for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (SJIRB XPD04-123 and XPD05-078)

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, source subject ID, and sex of participants with or without pancreatitis and involved in the "Pancreatitis after Treatment for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (SJIRB XPD04-123 and XPD05-078)" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, St Jude TOTALXV protocols, with or without pancreatitis, gender, and genotype race of participants with or without pancreatitis and involved in the "Pancreatitis after Treatment for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (SJIRB XPD04-123 and XPD05-078)" project.

variables.name: Clinical_Protocol
variables.description: St Jude TOTALXV protocols; Children's Oncology Group P9904, P9905, P9906, AALL0331 and AALL0232 protocols.

variables.name: GenotypeRace
variables.description: Race genetically determined using STRUCTURE with genome-wide mapping array

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status of sample, and histological type of sample obtained from participants with or without pancreatitis and involved in the "Pancreatitis after Treatment for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (SJIRB XPD04-123 and XPD05-078)" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

tables.description: Subject ID and sample ID of participants with or without pancreatitis and involved in the "Pancreatitis after Treatment for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (SJIRB XPD04-123 and XPD05-078)" project.
